ab: izua za ku seljaseljang a ti Cumay, ru alim a kemacu ta nemanga.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Cumay，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Cumay, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: nu sikitulutuluan, kisedjam timadju tua seljaseljang ta sivecivecik, ta siquliqulip katu vavecikan.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: si kintalj, si kinmusalj, si kintjelulj a nemanga sipasedjasedjam tjaimadju niamen a masantalj.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: ljakua izua za nakuya a kakudan nimadju, ru kisedjam tua nema sa ika pacikel.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: ka vililj anga neka anga nu venarung tua pasedjam tu nemanga tjanuamen a pimasantaljan.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: izua ka itua tu qadav, vayk amen a maciur a masantalj a kivangavang.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: ka i djalan tazua, manu malingav ti Cumay tu masausavan, ljakua namalim timadju a masi qucic.
ch: 路途中，Cumay想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Cumay wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: pasa kisedjam timadju tua nia seljaseljang ta qucic, ljakua nia tevelain a masantalj, tu ika aken a nakemacu uta niayain.
ch: 他跟同學們借衛生紙，可是我們大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: manu patjeljaqaung ti Cumay ka maqutjav, madudu timadju sa mayatucu, aku ika aken a nu pasedjaman tua qucic a masantalj aya!
ch: Cumay急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!
en: Cumay burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: pasemalavan timadju nua seljaseljang, ayatua ika sun a kitju kacu tua nemanga, sa aza sinipasedjam tjanusun a nemanga, ika sun angata a pacikel ayain!
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: ka macepeliv a qadav tua sisa kakituluan, na medjama sa djaljun i kakituluan ti Cumay, sa aza mareka kinisedjasedjam tua seljaseljang ni Cumay a nemanga pacikelen tjanuamen a seljaseljang.
ch: 隔天上學，Cumay很早就到學校了，Cumay把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Cumay arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: kipaqaljay tjanuamen a seljaseljang ti Cumay, sa mayatucu timadju kemasi tucu a qadav tjara kitju kacu anga aken tua nemanga aya, maljimalji uta tua tjanumun a ku seljaseljang aicu a sitjaisangasan a nasecalivat anga pukauy mun a pasedjama tua nemanga tjanuaken aya.
ch: Cumay向同學們道歉，並說他從今以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Cumay apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
